Services.Name: Connect-BKGraph
Services.Description: Connects Blackknight One to Microsoft Graph.

Services.Name: Get-BKOrganization
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra organization information.

Services.Name: Get-BKDomains
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra domain information.

Services.Name: Get-BKUsers
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra user inventory.

Services.Name: Get-BKGroups
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra group inventory.

Services.Name: Get-BKLicensing
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft 365 subscribed SKU information.

Services.Name: Get-BKTenant
Services.Description: Builds a normalized tenant summary from reusable discovery services.

Services.Name: Get-BKConditionalAccessPolicies
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra Conditional Access policy inventory.

Services.Name: Get-BKNamedLocations
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra Conditional Access named locations.

Services.Name: Get-BKAuthenticationMethodsSummary
Services.Description: Collects Microsoft Entra authentication method registration, MFA, SSPR, and passwordless readiness data.

Services.Name: Get-BKDirectoryRoles
Services.Description: Collects and resolves active Microsoft Entra directory-role assignments, principal types, deprecated roles, and review severity.

Services.Name: Get-BKIdentityGraph
Services.Description: Correlates Microsoft Entra users with authentication posture and active directory-role assignments.

Services.Name: New-BKResult
Services.Description: Creates standardized Blackknight One engine result objects.

Services.Name: Get-BKConfidenceScore
Services.Description: Calculates transparent confidence scores from validation checks and engine results.

Services.Name: Export-BKJsonReport
Services.Description: Exports Blackknight One result and report data to JSON.

Services.Name: Get-BKDashboardData
Services.Description: Builds normalized dashboard data from platform registries and current engine reports.

Services.Name: Write-BKLog
Services.Description: Writes standardized Blackknight One log messages.

Services.Name: Test-BKPlatform
Services.Description: Runs platform integrity, registry, service, engine, and PowerShell syntax validation checks.

Services.Name: Get-BKServiceManifest
Services.Description: Reads and returns the Blackknight One service manifest.

Services.Name: Get-BKPlatformConfiguration
Services.Description: Reads the Blackknight One platform registry configuration.

Services.Name: Get-BKPlatformInventory
Services.Description: Inventories installed platform engines, services, capabilities, reports, documentation, schemas, and Terraform assets.

Services.Name: Get-BKEngineManifest
Services.Description: Reads and normalizes Blackknight One engine manifest metadata.

Services.Name: Get-BKCapabilities
Services.Description: Returns platform capabilities advertised by registered engine manifests.

Services.Name: Get-BKPlatform
Services.Description: Returns the unified Blackknight One platform object, including configuration, engines, services, capabilities, and inventory.

Services.Name: Show-BKDashboard
Services.Description: Displays the Blackknight One operational dashboard.

Services.Name: Show-BKAuthenticationMethodsSummary
Services.Description: Displays a readable Microsoft Entra authentication methods, MFA, SSPR, and passwordless readiness summary.
